Release notes:
## Changelog
### Compiler
- [`KT-79276`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79276) Dexing fails with "Cannot read field X because <local0> is null" with 2.2.0
- [`KT-79442`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79442) "Multiple annotations of type kotlin.coroutines.jvm.internal.DebugMetadata": 2.2.0-Beta1 generates broken code with JVM default suspend methods in interfaces

### JavaScript
- [`KT-79050`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79050) KJS / IC: "Unexpected body of primary constructor for processing irClass"
- [`KT-79089`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79089) KJS: Could not load reporter / Cannot find module 'mocha' when running jsNode tests
### Native
- [`KT-79075`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79075) Stuck on Kotlin_getSourceInfo_core_symbolication
- [`KT-76178`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-76178) LLVM Update: symbol '__ZnwmSt19__type_descriptor_t' missing
### Tools. Kapt

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the JetBrains/kotlin release Kotlin 2.2.10-RC2, the changelog includes compiler fixes for dexing failures with null local variables, broken code generation for JVM default suspend methods in interfaces, and a missing symbol error on iOS 15.5 simulator in Xcode 16.3. JavaScript fixes address an unexpected IR class body and a missing 'mocha' module in jsNode tests. Native fixes resolve a stuck symbolication process and a missing LLVM symbol. Kapt fixes an unresolved reference issue with @kotlin.Metadata in Java.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the JetBrains/kotlin release Kotlin 2.2.10, the changelog includes compiler fixes for dexing failures, broken JVM default suspend methods, iOS simulator symbol errors, missing diagnostics for delegated interface methods, IR lowering failures, Kotlin/Native compiler performance reporting, missing inline diagnostics, an IllegalArgumentException, missing ABSTRACT_SUPER_CALL, and a false-positive identity sensitive operation warning. Compose compiler fixes ensure default transform affects functions, fix visibility for default wrappers, and emit parameter names in Compose source information. JavaScript fixes address the IR class body and mocha module issues. Native fixes include the symbolication and LLVM symbol issues, plus a crash on Apple Watch. CLI fixes resolve unresolved references and a NoClassDefFoundError. Compiler plugins fix an AssertionError for protected open composable calls and make jvm-abi-gen output classloader-friendly. Gradle fixes support creating KotlinJvmAndroidCompilation, and JS fixes address broken NPM build cache entries.

Release notes:
## Changelog
### Backend. Wasm
- [`KT-80018`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-80018) K/Wasm: exceptions don't work properly in JavaScriptCore (vm inside Safari, WebKit)
### Compiler
- [`KT-79979`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79979) K2: ClassCastException when overriding extension property with delegation
- [`KT-79866`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79866) kotlinc 2.2.0 silently emits 'NonExistentClass' instead of reporting an error
- [`KT-79276`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79276) Dexing fails with "Cannot read field X because <local0> is null" with 2.2.0

### Compose compiler
- [`b/432262806`](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/432262806) Fix target description lookup
- [`b/436870733`](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/436870733) Prevent lambda memoization in local classes inside a composable
- [`b/432485982`](https://issuetracker.google.com/issues/432485982) Fix AbstractMethodError when overriding function with default parameters
### JavaScript
- [`KT-79916`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79916) K/JS: "Uncaught TypeError" when using 'Xes-long-as-bigint' in compose-html
- [`KT-79977`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79977) KJS: Long.rotateLeft returns incorrect result when BigInts are enabled
- [`KT-79644`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79644) BigInt enabled for ES 2015 despite being an ES 2020 feature
- [`KT-79089`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79089) KJS: Could not load reporter / Cannot find module 'mocha' when running jsNode tests
### Native
- [`KT-79075`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79075) Stuck on Kotlin_getSourceInfo_core_symbolication
### Tools. Compiler plugins. Serialization
- [`KT-79695`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79695) Serialization does not exclude field-less properties in 2.2.20-Beta2
### Tools. Gradle. JS
- [`KT-79921`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79921) Web Tooling Gradle API does not respect webpack reconfiguration
- [`KT-76996`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-76996) Wasm: js tasks triggers wasm subtasks
### Tools. Gradle. Swift Export
- [`KT-79554`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79554) Swift Export status diagnostic is produced even if swift export is not configured
### Tools. Kapt
- [`KT-79641`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79641) Kapt: too much information is printed in verbose mode
- [`KT-79136`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-79136) K2 kapt: unresolved nested class references in annotation arguments are generated without outer class names
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the JetBrains/kotlin release Kotlin 2.2.20-RC, the changelog includes a Wasm backend fix for exceptions in JavaScriptCore. Compiler fixes address a ClassCastException with extension property delegation, silent emission of NonExistentClass, dexing failures, missing MISSING_DEPENDENCY_CLASS, an UnsupportedOperationException with inlining and value classes, and nested type alias unreachability. Compose compiler fixes include target description lookup, preventing lambda memoization in local classes, and fixing AbstractMethodError for overridden functions with default parameters. JavaScript fixes address an Uncaught TypeError with long-as-bigint, incorrect Long.rotateLeft results, BigInt enabled for ES 2015, and the mocha module issue. Native fixes resolve the stuck symbolication. Serialization plugin fixes exclude field-less properties. Gradle JS fixes address webpack reconfiguration and Wasm subtask triggering. Swift Export fixes a status diagnostic issue. Kapt fixes reduce verbose output and fix unresolved nested class references.

Release notes:
## Changelog
### Analysis API

- [`KT-73586`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-73586) [Analysis API] Add `lazyResolveToPhase(STATUS)` before accessing modifiers of members
- [`KT-71135`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-71135) AA: exception from sealed inheritors checker when `analyzeCopy`
- [`KT-75534`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-75534) K2 AA: "Containing declaration should present for nested declaration class KtNamedFunction" with dangling annotation on top-level anonymous function
- [`KT-75687`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-75687) K2: local variable doesn't get to the do-while scope
- [`KT-56543`](https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/KT-56543) LL FIR: rework lazy transformers so transformers modify only declarations they suppose to
### Analysis API. Infrastructure
- [`KT-76809`](https://youtrack.jetbrains...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the JetBrains/kotlin release Kotlin 2.2.20, the changelog includes Analysis API fixes for synthetic properties, guarded when conditions, and visibility checker efficiency. Code Compilation fixes address IR lowering errors, expression evaluation with local classes, @JvmName annotation recognition, KMP debugger issues, and evaluator resolution of local variables. FIR performance improvements avoid loading AST during contracts phase and optimize resolved declaration checks. FIR fixes address SOE from recursive value classes, companion object references via typealias, partial body resolution, context parameters on dangling modifier lists, delegation generic signature checker, context() call errors, NPE in Java type parameter bounds, KaType.asPsiType returning null, implicit receiver smart-cast snapshots, resolveToFirSymbol finding scripts, lazy resolution before accessing modifiers, sealed inheritors checker exceptions, dangling annotation on anonymous functions, local variable scope in do-while, and lazy transformer rework. Infrastructure fixes address various issues.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the JetBrains/kotlin release Kotlin 2.2.21-RC, the changelog includes Wasm backend fixes for JsException on Safari and exceptions in JavaScriptCore.
